'''Tinian Hanther''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an agent to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Biography==
Employed by [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], she operated out of [[Tarhassan]] following the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. A former member of the [[Department of Health]], she was part of a specialized team to rescue [[Edbit Teeks]] from prison. Along with [[Mapper]] Gann, [[Joram Kithe]], [[Livintius Sazet]], and [[Cherek Tuhm]], they kidnapped a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] agent named [[Zazana Renkel]] who knew about Edbit's location. After receiving the intel, Tinian disguised herself as a guard and assisted in transferring a prisoner to the [[Nehass]] [[Nehass Prison|prison]]. During that phase of the operation, Kithe proudly welcomed her into intelligence service.

{{Char-stub}}
